articles.title: Sturgeon tells BBC: I'm serving a sentence for crime I didn't commit
articles.description: Scotland's former first minister is challenged by Laura Kuenssberg over the SNP embezzlement scandal, and at times struggles to hold back tears.

articles.title: Sturgeon the master communicator was close to tears - but still faces more questions
articles.description: The former Scottish first minister’s security in her own power and authority seems to have gone, writes Laura Kuenssberg.

articles.title: Between celebration and confrontation: Paris after PSG victory
articles.description: Nearly 800 people were arrested after clashes with police following the Champions League final.
